info.name: Pet Store API - QA Automation
info.description:
API test collection for the Swagger Pet Store (https://petstore.swagger.io/v2).

Covers all 20 documented endpoints across the Pet, Store and User modules, with at least one positive and one negative test per endpoint, request chaining via collection variables, and an auto-set auth header.

Run in Postman (Collection Runner) or via Newman:
  newman run PetStore.postman_collection.json -e PetStore.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra

Authored for the API Testing assignment (Pet Store Swagger).

exec: // Collection-level pre-request script (runs before EVERY request).
// Bonus requirement: auto-set the auth header so individual requests do not hardcode it.
// The Pet Store demo accepts the static API key 'special-key'.
// Generate a per-run unique numeric id so reruns do not collide.
// BONUS: auto-set an OAuth2 Bearer token once per run (collection-level).
// Real flow: POST to the OAuth2 token endpoint, read access_token, store it.
// The petstore demo has no token server, so we obtain a session token via
// GET /user/login as a stand-in and expose it as {{bearerToken}}.
// Collection-level test script (runs after EVERY request).
// Global non-functional guardrail: every response must beat a 3s SLA.
pm.test('Response time is under 3000ms (SLA guardrail)', function () {

pm.test('Deleted id returned in response', function () {
pm.test('Deleting an already-deleted pet returns 404', function () {

// orderId must be 1..10 for the getOrderById range, so keep it small and deterministic.

// Create a pet first so the auth check targets a real resource.
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ id: Number(pid), name: 'Auth-QA', photoUrls: ['x'], status: 'available' }) }
pm.test('Authenticated request with valid api_key returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
// SPEC: GET /pet/{petId} is protected by api_key. No key => must be 401.
pm.test('Unauthenticated request should be rejected with 401 (auth bypass if 200)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(401); });
pm.test('Invalid api_key should be rejected with 401 (auth bypass if 200)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(401); });
// SPEC: GET /store/inventory is protected by api_key.

body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ id: Number(pid), name: 'Auth-QA', photoUrls: ['x'], status: 'available' }) }
// SPEC: DELETE /pet/{petId} is protected by petstore_auth (OAuth2).
pm.test('Delete without OAuth token should be rejected with 401 (auth bypass if 200/404)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(401); });
